doc_title_en: Notice on Revision of Full-Year Earnings Forecast and Dividend Forecast (Dividend Increase) for FY6/26
doc_title_jp: 通期業績予想の修正及び配当予想の修正（増配）に関するお知らせ

key_facts.reason_jp: 業績予想上方修正（不動産売却案件の契約締結、介護事業の堅調推移）に伴い、株主利益還元を充実

name_jp: チャーム・ケア・コーポレーション
summary_en: Year-end dividend raised to ¥23/share from ¥17/share projection; annual dividend ¥43/share (prior ¥37/share). Payout ratio 39.4%, above company policy floor of 30%+. Triggered by upward FY6/26 earnings revision (net income to ¥3,570M from ¥3,090M) driven by property-sale contract finalization and continued productivity gains in care operations.
summary_jp: 期末配当を17円から23円に引き上げ、年間配当は37円から43円へ。配当性向39.4%で、同社基準の30%以上を上回る。FY6/26業績予想上方修正（純利益3,570百万円、前回3,090百万円）を踏まえた。
tag_en: Dividend - ¥43/share (¥37→¥43, +6 yen hike) - FY6/26 - 39.4% payout ratio
